name: sd_d2_nl_trail_del
drl:
rule "RJ"
no-loop
when
    $p : P($x : f0)
    not LK2(f1 != true)
then
    insertLogical(new LK2($x, false));
end
rule "RD"
no-loop
salience -5
when
    $p : P($x : f0)
    not LK2(f1 != true)
then
    delete($p);
end
_finding: GREEN control 3x: trailing-not no-loop justifier + deleter terminates [RJ1,RD1,RD2] — no-loop blocks the t15 revival (the justifier never refires); trail does not run away.
